scripts.android:build: npm run sync && npx cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.ios:build: npm run sync && npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -project App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' -derivedDataPath build build
scripts.ios:sim: (xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 17' || true) && open -a Simulator && xcrun simctl install 'iPhone 17' ios/App/build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/App.app && xcrun simctl launch 'iPhone 17' com.sugarolly.bbqsmokertimes
scripts.android:release: npm run sync && npx cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew bundleRelease
